changeSet.author: krusche
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM DATABASECHANGELOG WHERE ID not like '0000000000000%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260205132454%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260301010101%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260304120000%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260312120000%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260313112454%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260327190000%' AND FILENAME NOT LIKE '%20260330120000%';
